title: Open Cursors
breadcrumbs: Deployment Considerations for Performance and Scalability
text: Open Cursors Each entity of a Uniface form opens a cursor in the database. If not enough cursors are available, cursors are swapped in memory, raising the potential for memory collisions and crashes. For example, a Purchase Order form might use over 200 open cursors during a session. If the user opens multiple instances of an entry form, an equal number of cursors is used per each instance. Some databases enable you to set the number of open cursors. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
